content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 sofatutor GmbH: CRO Specialist (all genders) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇸🇪 Sweden, and 🇸🇰 Slovakia Berlin A/B Testing and Figma Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5423/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.sofatutor.com/">https://jobs.sofatutor.com/</a> </p> <div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx"><div><p>Design and run A/B tests that directly impact subscription growth for one of Europe's leading EdTech platforms – 1M+ users, real experiments, measurable results.</p><p><br></p><p>We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist (gn)</strong>&nbsp;to join our Product Growth Team and help drive one of sofatutor’s most important goals: turning more parents into customers who trust us to support their children’s learning journey. In this role, your work will have a direct and measurable impact on the company’s success. By designing and running smart, strategic A/B tests, you’ll help increase user acquisition, activation, and retention across our subscription-based learning products. You’ll collaborate closely with designers, developers, data analysts, and senior leadership to uncover high-potential growth opportunities and turn insights into real results.</p><p><br>&nbsp;<strong>100% remote (EMEA)&nbsp;</strong>| ⏳&nbsp;<strong>32-40h/week</strong></p><p><br></p><h3>Your Tasks:</h3><ul><li><p><strong>Define and implement growth experiments across the funnel —</strong>&nbsp;from hypothesis to launch and evaluation.</p></li><li><p><strong>Maintain a clear pipeline of experiments</strong>&nbsp;based on impact, effort, and learning value.</p></li><li><p><strong>Collaborate closely with design, engineering</strong>, and key&nbsp;<strong>stakeholders</strong>&nbsp;to translate testing concepts into high-quality experiments.</p></li><li><p><strong>Leverage analytics, user research, competitor insights</strong>, and best practices to identify opportunities and build strong hypotheses.</p></li><li><p><strong>Share</strong>&nbsp;experiment&nbsp;<strong>results, insights, and learnings</strong>&nbsp;transparently with the team and stakeholders to drive alignment and continuous improvement.</p></li></ul></div></div><h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 bvUNBQ custom-css-style-job-requirements">What you bring to the table:</h2><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx"><ul><li><p>A minimum of<strong>&nbsp;2 – 4+ years of experience</strong>&nbsp;in conversion rate optimization (CRO), website optimization, or growth-focused roles.</p></li><li><p>A&nbsp;<strong>strong track record</strong>&nbsp;of designing and executing experiments that resulted in measurable business outcomes (e.g., increased conversion rates, revenue uplift).</p></li><li><p>Experience working in&nbsp;<strong>high-velocity testing</strong>&nbsp;environments and a drive to continuously improve experimentation speed without sacrificing quality or learning value.</p></li><li><p><strong>Advanced analytical capabilities</strong>&nbsp;with hands-on experience interpreting quantitative data from platforms such as GA4, Amplitude, or Power BI.</p></li><li><p><strong>Strong conceptual thinking</strong>, with the ability to structure and prioritize experiments around strategic growth objectives.</p></li><li><p><strong>Proficiency in Figma or equivalent design tool</strong>&nbsp;is essential, with the ability to independently produce high-fidelity, multi-variant test concepts.</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication skills in English, with the&nbsp;<strong>ability to present insights and strategies clearly</strong>&nbsp;to stakeholders across functions and seniority levels.</p></li><li><p>Experience with A/B testing tools (e.g., Convert) and familiarity with complementary insight tools (e.g., Hotjar).</p></li><li><p>Preferred qualifications (not required): German language skills to better understand customer needs in DACH markets.</p></li></ul><h3>What we offer:</h3><ul><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Flexible Work:</strong> Flexible hours, remote-first, up to 180 days/year from EU if not located in Germany</p></li><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Team Events:</strong>&nbsp;Regular meetups – online and in Berlin.</p></li><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Extra Time Off:</strong> 2 paid volunteering days + Dec 24 &amp; 31 off<br></p></li></ul><p>At sofatutor, we are committed to continuously developing an inclusive work environment that supports your growth - regardless of gender, marital status, sexual orientation, religious beliefs, age, disability, education, or ethnicity. We’d love for you to join us in shaping this together!</p></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders</a></p> Fri, 05 Jun 2026 07:20:55 +0000 Sun, 05 Jul 2026 07:20:55 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders Compass Business Solutions: Marketing Specialist Pennsylvania Adobe Creative Suite, Analytics, Community Growth, Architect, Architecture, Blog Writing, Analytics Tools, Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5419/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://wearecompass.com">http://wearecompass.com</a> </p> <div class="col col-xs-7 description"> <div class="WordSection1"><div><span><span><span><b><span>Who We Are:</span></b><br><span>Since 1963, A&amp;H Equipment Co. has been the leading provider of municipal, truck and environmental solutions in Pennsylvania, West Virginia, and now in Ohio.</span></span></span></span><br><br><span><span><span><b><span>Role Overview: </span></b></span></span></span><br><span><span><span><span>A&amp;H</span> <span>is</span> <span>seek
